overview: OfNeeds is a modern B2B ecommerce website for a corporate gifting company, featuring employee welcome kits, customized merchandise (T-shirts, jackets, caps, sipper bottles, trophies, notebooks, eco-friendly products), and SEO-optimized landing pages targeting HR teams, procurement heads, and event organizers across India.
features: Corporate gifting product catalog with Welcome Kits, Apparel, Accessories, Eco-Friendly, and Trophies categories
Ready-to-ship starter packs — ₹599 Essential and ₹1199 Premium employee welcome kits
Bulk order enquiry form saved to backend
13 SEO-optimized product landing pages with 800+ words each
Trusted by Global Leaders section with 6 client logos
Full schema markup (LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Product, BreadcrumbList)
Sitemap.xml and robots.txt for Google indexing
Fully responsive mobile-first layout with Playfair Display headings
